title: Opening multiple windows desktop app
excerpt: Is there an option to open multiple windows of the desktop app, so I can open two different boards on the same time next to each other?

posts.author: Momo (Monique de Goeij)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there an option to open multiple windows of the desktop app, so I can open two different boards on the same time next to each other?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Momo! Have you tried opening monday in the desktop version and browser version at the same time? Or having the browser version open with multiple tabs?

posts.author: Momo (Monique de Goeij)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Charlotte,

Yes that was I’m using now, but I was wondering if it also was possible in the desktop app

posts.author: Joeyd377 (Joey DiFazio)
posts.cookedHtml: I too, have a need for this. Being able to open more than one window would allow me to play audio and read along with copy sent with the project. Being able to open multiple windows would be a huge help.

posts.author: FrancisElliott (Francis Elliott)
posts.cookedHtml: As a user, I’d strongly recommend using the browser version of monday.com, for exactly this reason. Also take note that it performs differently depending on browser. Certain features do not function correctly in Safari, for example. Chrome is typically the most reliable choice.

posts.author: bonecrushin (Olivia Nunya)
posts.cookedHtml: for me the browser version creates distractions and allows me to very easily click out of Monday and get off-track. i am trying to put all of my work in monday.com but i am having trouble because i don’t spend enough time in there.

posts.author: mondayuser5 (Sam)
posts.cookedHtml: I would also be interested in this functionality. I’d love to hear about any updates if this feature ends up getting added to a future development roadmap.

posts.author: amberzuniga (amber zunig)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey! Being able to open multiple windows of the desktop app would be super handy, especially for multitasking
